title: Gold Rush Maisie
director: Edwin L. Marin, J. Walter Ruben, Norman Taurog
writer: Elizabeth Reinhardt, Mary C. McCall Jr., Wilson Collison
actors: Ann Sothern, Lee Bowman, Slim Summerville
plot: Maisie Ravier finds herself stranded in an Arizona ghost town with a family of migrant dust bowl refugees. The ghost town, it turns out, may have a gold mine.
